mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELED','CANCELLED')) AS orderCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELED','CANCELLED')) AS totalSales, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS memberCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS activeStoreCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores) AS totalStoreCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELED','CANCELLED')) AS yesterdayOrderCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND order_status NOT IN ('CANCELED','CANCELLED')) AS yesterdaySales, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)) AS newMemberThisWeek

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS saleDate, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) AS totalSales FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND order_status != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY saleDate

SELECT s.category AS category, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_price), 0) AS totalSales FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.id WHERE o.order_status != 'CANCELED' GROUP BY s.category ORDER BY orderCount DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members
AND (email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND role = #{role}
AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET role = #{role}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET esg_point = #{esgPoint}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NOW(), stop_reason = #{stopReason} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE stores SET deleted_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET order_status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reviews SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
